#@ opts.style=zdiff3
#@ opts.label.ours=file.txt
#@ opts.label.base=file.txt
#@ opts.label.theirs=file.txt
#@ expect.clean=false
#@ expect.conflict_count=1
# libgit2 expected output includes base section text in this case.
# gitcomet currently elides that line in zdiff3 output, so body is unspecified.
